twitter_thread: Swiss dev teams waste 240 hours/month due to poor Kuratierte Agent Skills implementation. A clear checklist can halve this.
Define 5 key skills per agent using Checklisten. This reduces skill overlap by 30% and boosts productivity.
Templates cut development time by 120 hours/project. Use them for data processing, decision-making, and reporting.
Leitfäden reduce onboarding time from 12 to 7 weeks. They also improve skill adoption by 25%.
Failing to update Checklisten and Templates quarterly leads to 20% of skills becoming outdated.
Allocate 8 hours/week for Kuratierte Agent Skills updates. This ensures 95% of skills remain relevant.
How do you prioritize Kuratierte Agent Skills updates in your dev team? #aidevelopment #agentskills
